title: Security Headers Scanner — Input
description: Scans a URL (or list of URLs) for HTTP security headers and returns a graded report with letter grade, severity breakdown, per-header status, and ready-to-paste config snippets.

url.title: Single URL to scan
url.description: The page you want graded. Either this or 'urls' is required.

urls.title: Multiple URLs (batch mode)
urls.description: Array of URLs to scan. Capped at 1000 per run. If both 'url' and 'urls' are provided, 'urls' takes precedence.
